paco.title: PACO Webinar
paco.subtitle: Adaptation Priorities in Central and West Africa
paco.description: Join us for a webinar dedicated to climate change adaptation priorities in Central and West Africa. This event will bring together experts, decision-makers and practitioners to discuss the most urgent adaptation strategies for the region.

presentation.title: Local Authorities Facing Climate Change
presentation.subtitle: Governance, Planning and Financing for Adaptation
presentation.context: In French-speaking countries, decentralized authorities play a strategic role in the concrete implementation of climate change adaptation policies. Located closest to the populations, they are responsible for local planning, land use management and coordination of essential services. However, despite their central position, local authorities face several challenges: limited financial resources, insufficient technical capacities, poor access to climate data and lack of integration of local knowledge into territorial plans.
presentation.objectiveGeneral: Strengthen the capacities of local authorities to plan, finance and implement climate change adaptation actions.

objectives.0: Present the roles, responsibilities and levers of action of local authorities in climate adaptation
objectives.1: Highlight successful experiences in territorial adaptation planning and financing
objectives.2: Identify needs for capacity building, financing and local governance tools
objectives.3: Present innovative approaches to financing adaptation at the local level

0.title: Local Governance
0.desc: Contribution of local authorities to the implementation of NDCs, NAPs and sectoral policies

1.title: Territorial Planning
1.desc: Territorial diagnostics, climate risk management and resilient infrastructure

2.title: Local Financing
2.desc: Access to international funds, green budgets, local taxation and public-private partnerships

3.title: Case Studies
3.desc: Experiences of rural and urban municipalities: water management, resilient agriculture, nature-based solutions
